svg.title: Neural network complete workflow diagram
svg.desc: End-to-end neural network workflow: raw data through preprocessing, architecture, forward pass, loss, backpropagation, weight update, and evaluation.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What kinds of raw data can neural networks take as input?')
sendPrompt('What preprocessing steps are applied before feeding data to a neural network?')
sendPrompt('How is a neural network architecture designed — layers, neurons, activations?')
g.text: input layer → hidden layers → output layer

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What happens during the forward pass of a neural network?')
sendPrompt('What are loss functions in neural networks and why do we need them?')
sendPrompt('How does backpropagation compute gradients in a neural network?')
sendPrompt('How do optimizers like SGD and Adam update neural network weights?')
sendPrompt('What is regularization in neural networks and why is it needed?')
g.text: dropout · L2 weight decay · batch norm

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How is a trained neural network evaluated on test data?')
sendPrompt('How do you deploy a trained neural network for inference?')
